name: 7 Months Later, The Bad Ending of Losing Erin and Charlie
description:
Post NTR (they’re not yours any more so I called it post Ntr)

It’s been 7 months since Erin and Charlie had Ayasha over initially, she hasn’t left and both Erin and Charlie are now hers.

Part 5 of 5 of the 1000 follower special (we’re at 1100 now, wow!) please request more bots using the link

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSffvwRY6lGXMnQLvt7iZGzPZnbOTOZYf42EBYPOpsaoFiqEnQ/viewform?usp=header

⭐️JLLM MAY NOT BE ABLE TO PROCESS MEMORY CORRECTLY, PLEASE USE SUMMARY OFTEN (start once you open the bot and then I recommend every 10 messages afterwards)⭐️

Art by mooncancer00

Full comic that this bot was based on
creator: shamalamah
